scripts.mem:dev: op run --env-file=.env.op -- yarn mem:dev:local || yarn mem:dev:local
scripts.mem:build: op run --env-file=.env.op -- yarn mem:build:local || yarn mem:build:local
scripts.mem:start: op run --env-file=.env.op -- yarn mem:start:local || yarn mem:start:local
scripts.compose:up:local: sh -c 'CURRENT_UID=$(id -u) CURRENT_GID=$(id -g) docker compose -f docker-compose.${INTERNAL_CONNECTION_MODE:?INTERNAL_CONNECTION_MODE is required}.yml up -d'
scripts.compose:up: yarn clean:appledouble && op run --env-file=.env.op -- yarn compose:up:local
scripts.compose:down:local: sh -c 'CURRENT_UID=$(id -u) CURRENT_GID=$(id -g) docker compose -f docker-compose.${INTERNAL_CONNECTION_MODE:?INTERNAL_CONNECTION_MODE is required}.yml down --remove-orphans'
scripts.compose:down: yarn clean:appledouble && op run --env-file=.env.op -- yarn compose:down:local
scripts.compose:ps:local: sh -c 'CURRENT_UID=$(id -u) CURRENT_GID=$(id -g) docker compose -f docker-compose.${INTERNAL_CONNECTION_MODE:?INTERNAL_CONNECTION_MODE is required}.yml ps'
scripts.compose:ps: yarn clean:appledouble && op run --env-file=.env.op -- yarn compose:ps:local
scripts.compose:logs:local: sh -c 'CURRENT_UID=$(id -u) CURRENT_GID=$(id -g) docker compose -f docker-compose.${INTERNAL_CONNECTION_MODE:?INTERNAL_CONNECTION_MODE is required}.yml logs -f --tail=100'
scripts.compose:logs: yarn clean:appledouble && op run --env-file=.env.op -- yarn compose:logs:local
